creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
travel is my therapy & experiencing elevated luxury at @marinabaysands #singapore makes my stay memorable ✨🏩🏙️🛁🏊🏻‍♀️✨ watch to the end to see the world’s largest infinity rooftop pool ✨ #thatMBSmoment #swiminthesky

staying in this newly refurbished premium suite at tower 2 & with the elite sands lifestyle card I get so many benefits & complimentary experiences & earning resort dollars 

reel @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#marinabaysands #moshesafdiearchitect #dotzsoh #luxuryhotel #beautifulhotels #visitsingapore

transcription.text: In the sky, flashing lights It's all she ever wants to do Hanging underneath, to be popular That's her dream, to be popular Kill anyone, to be popular Sell her soul, to be popular Popular, just to be popular Everybody scream, cause she popular Streaming stream, cause she popular Never be free, cause she popular Money on top of me, money on top of her Money on top of me, money on top of her I know that you see me Times gone by Spent my whole life running from your flashing lights Try to own it But I'm alright You can't take my soul without a fucking fight
